title: Service and repair rotary cutting systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service and repair rotary cutting systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service and repair rotary cutting system

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for service and repair activity 1.3 Identify hazards and manage risks according to workplace procedures1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for service and repair activity 1.3 Identify hazards and manage risks according to workplace procedures1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for service and repair activity 1.3 Identify hazards and manage risks according to workplace procedures1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service and repair rotary cutting system

elements.title: Determine service and repair requirements of rotary cutting system

pcs.text: Identify faults through inspection and identify causes2.2 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faults through inspection and identify causes2.2 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faults through inspection and identify causes2.2 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine service and repair requirements of rotary cutting system

elements.title: Carry out service and repair activities

pcs.text: Select and check tools, equipment and materials required to conduct service and repair3.2 Remove and inspect components for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check tools, equipment and materials required to conduct service and repair3.2 Remove and inspect components for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check tools, equipment and materials required to conduct service and repair3.2 Remove and inspect components for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out service and repair activities

elements.title: Check rotary cutting system for normal operation

pcs.text: Operate system and compare to manufacturer specifications 4.2 Adjust and re-test rotary cutting system as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate system and compare to manufacturer specifications 4.2 Adjust and re-test rotary cutting system as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate system and compare to manufacturer specifications 4.2 Adjust and re-test rotary cutting system as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Check rotary cutting system for normal operation

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
